creator: jdferrell3@yahoo.com
text:
Attached diff updates doc/share/sgml/man-refs.ent to reflect change in FreeBSD 7 where mrouted(8), mrinfo(8), and map-mbone(8) were removed from the base system, but can still be found in the ports collection.  This problem was originally noted in docs/124666.  doc/124685 uses this patch.

John

Fix: 

4281c4281
< <!ENTITY man.map-mbone.8 "<citerefentry/<refentrytitle/map-mbone/<manvolnum/8//">
---
> <!ENTITY man.map-mbone.8 "<citerefentry vendor='ports'/<refentrytitle/map-mbone/<manvolnum/8//">
4327,4328c4327,4328
< <!ENTITY man.mrinfo.8 "<citerefentry/<refentrytitle/mrinfo/<manvolnum/8//">
< <!ENTITY man.mrouted.8 "<citerefentry/<refentrytitle/mrouted/<manvolnum/8//">
---
> <!ENTITY man.mrinfo.8 "<citerefentry vendor='ports'/<refentrytitle/mrinfo/<manvolnum/8//">
> <!ENTITY man.mrouted.8 "<citerefentry vendor='ports'/<refentrytitle/mrouted/<manvolnum/8//">
